mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id, session_id, user_id, dept_id, question, answer, source_chunks, top_score, confidence_level, no_answer, feedback, feedback_remark, create_time FROM kb_qa_conversation WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC, conversation_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_qa_conversation (session_id, user_id, dept_id, question, answer, source_chunks, top_score, confidence_level, no_answer, feedback, feedback_remark, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{deptId}, #{question}, #{answer}, #{sourceChunks}, #{topScore}, #{confidenceLevel}, #{noAnswer}, #{feedback}, #{feedbackRemark}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_qa_conversation WHERE create_time >= CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_qa_conversation WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND no_answer = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM kb_qa_conversation WHERE create_time >= CURDATE() AND feedback = 'UNHELPFUL'
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(top_score), 4), 0) FROM kb_qa_conversation WHERE top_score IS NOT NULL
